title: Mob Crates
description: Replaces spawn eggs with mobs in Crates
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/UcbujPf.png)

This pack replaces boring old spawn eggs with cute mobs in crates! Perfect for map makers or modpack creators who want a more immersive way to give mobs to players. Or, just something cute for your creative inventory.

Made in collaboration with the original author [NoCube](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nocubeyt/projects), who created the fantastic [Villagers Sell Animals Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/villagers-sell-animals). This pack expands upon that original concept in a vanilla-friendly way. Go check it out! (requires Forge)

Incomplete Mobs:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Boss Mobs: Warden, Ender Dragon (commands only), Wither (commands only)
Spawnable Golems: Snow Golem, Iron Golem

</details>

![Images](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png)
